# beanies.family

> beanies.family is a local-first, privacy-first family planning PWA. It helps families track finances (accounts, transactions, budgets, goals), plan activities and travel, and collaborate as a unit. All data lives on the user's device; optional Google Drive sync uses AES-GCM encryption with user-controlled keys. Open-source (MIT), built with Vue 3, Automerge CRDTs, and the Web Crypto API.

## core

- [homepage](https://beanies.family): value prop, features, links
- [the beanstalk (blog)](https://beanies.family/blog): stories, updates, philosophy from the making of beanies.family
- [help center](https://beanies.family/help): 24+ articles across 5 categories — getting started, features, security, how it works, what's new
- [about greg](https://beanies.family/about/greg): founder bio

## policies

- [privacy policy](https://beanies.family/privacy): local-first architecture, no server-side PII, Plausible analytics, Google Drive opt-in with client-side encryption
- [terms of service](https://beanies.family/terms): MIT open source, plain-language terms, no financial advice

## concepts

- [the .beanpod file explained](https://beanies.family/help/security/the-beanpod-file-explained): the encrypted family data file
- [how your data is encrypted](https://beanies.family/help/security/how-your-data-is-encrypted): AES-GCM, AES-KW, Web Crypto API
- [zero-knowledge architecture](https://beanies.family/help/security/zero-knowledge-architecture): what "local-first" means in practice
- [net worth calculation](https://beanies.family/help/how-it-works/net-worth-calculation)

## feeds

- [rss](https://beanies.family/blog/rss.xml): beanstalk blog feed
- [sitemap](https://beanies.family/sitemap-index.xml): full URL index with lastmod
- [llms-full.txt](https://beanies.family/llms-full.txt): concatenated blog + help content for LLM context windows

## the app

- The PWA itself is at https://app.beanies.family — authenticated, user-specific, not indexed. Use the marketing site (this domain) for public content.
